_comment: CloudFront distribution config for public LMS/web traffic only
_instructions: Create this distribution in AWS Console → CloudFront → Create Distribution
_admin_note: Admin traffic should use admin.elevateforhumanity.org directly (CNAME to the admin ALB). Do not expose raw ALB DNS names as public entrypoints.

Origins._comment: Use the LMS origin DNS name (ALB or upstream origin), e.g. elevate-lms-alb-123456789.us-east-1.elb.amazonaws.com. This value is an internal origin only, not a public URL.

DefaultCacheBehavior._comment_cache: CachePolicyId above = CachingDisabled (for dynamic Next.js routes)

CacheBehaviors._comment_cache: CachingOptimized — 1 year for immutable static assets

ViewerCertificate._comment: Request cert in ACM for elevateforhumanity.org + www.elevateforhumanity.org. Admin domain should use its own certificate on the admin ALB listener.
